text: TCS presents a compelling value entry point, trading 30.29% below its 52-week high with an RSI of 30.7 indicating it is clearly oversold. A bullish MACD crossover 4 days ago, coupled with a rising MACD histogram at 10.984, signals a positive shift in momentum and suggests a potential bottom is in for the stock.
prompt:

Lane: value

  RSI: 30.7
  MACD histogram: 10.984
  Price: Rs.2357.830078125
  EMA20: Rs.2450.6
  Distance below 52-week high: 30.29%
  MACD crossover: 4 days ago
Mutual fund context: none

Cons (already analyzed): 3.8% below 20-day average — trend not turned

- Use ONLY the values above. Do not invent prices, percentages, or company facts.
- Write 2-3 sentences total. Plain English. No jargon-heavy phrasing.
- Explain WHY the technical signals matter for an entry decision.
